nodes.name: 非法猎捕

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Human-related losses include entanglement in fishing gear, boating disturbance, and poaching as well as additional habitat degradation. There was a pronounced decline in American white pelican numbers in the mid-20th century, attributable to the excessive spraying of DDT, endrin, and other organochlorides in agriculture as well as widespread draining and pollution of wetlands
